description_long: This is a medium-sized, boxy truck with a rectangular cargo compartment and a compact cab at the front. The truck features a muted greenish-gray body with a slightly raised section at the rear, likely for cargo storage. The cab is positioned at one end, with visible side mirrors and a windshield, while the cargo area is enclosed and appears to be made of metal panels. The wheels are small and set close to the body, suggesting a utilitarian design for urban deliveries or transport. The truck's overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function. The rear of the truck is flat, with no visible doors or ramps, and the front has a simple grille and headlight arrangement.
description: A boxy, greenish-gray urban delivery truck with a compact cab and enclosed cargo area, designed for utility and transport. The truck has a simple, functional appearance with minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, with the cab on the left and the boxy cargo area extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow cab, windshield, and grille, with the cargo area mostly hidden behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with the cab on the right and the cargo area extending left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat back of the cargo area, with no visible doors or ramps, and the truck's overall boxy shape.
